schema.title: Flat

parameters.description: Flatten nested media objects into a single list

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_medias_gql (
    user_id="123123", profile_grid_items_cursor=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get a user following (one request required)

schema.title: Response User Following Chunk Gql User Following Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
followings, end_cursor = await cl.user_following_chunk_gql(
    user_id="123123", end_cursor=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
items_list = []
end_cursor = None
while True:
    items, end_cursor = cl.user_following_chunk_gql("123123", end_cursor=end_cursor)
    items_list.extend(items)
    if not end_cursor:
        break
x-codeSamples.label: Python
